mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_comments (recipe_id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{commentCreateDto.userId}, #{commentCreateDto.content}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{recipeId} AND comment_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT comment_count FROM recipes WHERE id = #{recipeId}
